channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: >BTC? you're just betting that a bigger retard will pay you more than you did why aren't people as angry about this conc… — 17 replies — 68.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>BTC? you're just betting that a bigger retard will pay you more than you did why aren't people as angry about this conc…

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-03-04 20:56 UTC

OP

>BTC? you're just betting that a bigger retard will pay you more than you did
why aren't people as angry about this concept when the question is about gold? because cryptos have given too much "underserved" wealth to some people?

Early replies (first 3)

61936302
>>61936177
At least BTC serves an actual function. 95% of the bullion that gets traded around to spergs will never ever be smelted down and used for its conductive properties.
BTC is a currency, and you're still using it as one even if you're just saving with it.

61936315
>>61936302
>At least BTC serves an actual function.
>says this and compares ponzi fake ultrafiat "money" to GOLD
biggest fucktard I've seen on /biz/ this whole week possibly

61936320
>>61936315
my original point is that gold as an investment is motivated excactly the same as BTC, it's just more conservative and tested. BTC is just gold on steroids, the fundamental idea isn't far off.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61936323
>>61936315
>ultrafiat
But enough about gold, which needs IOUs to function as a "currency".
Crypto won. Metaltards stay eternally seething.

61936395
>>61936177
gold has intrinsic value, we make things out of gold purely because it looks pretty. If modern civilization collapsed tomorrow I could still trade my gold for goods and services like we have done for thousands of years. My btc, not so much.

61936416
>>61936395
gold's practical use explains 5% of its market value. besides that fraction, all the points about perceived value apply the same to bitcoin. the latter is obviously younger being a child of the internet age.

>le societal collapse
you got your gold physically with you right now? good for you then. i know i won't be betting on that outcome myself.

61936421
>>61936323
But you can't get btc physical?

61936438
>>61936416
the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold but to have a safety net. My point is unlike bitcoin you can't become the greater fool buy buying physical gold.

61936444
>>61936421
Better, you get it in it's energy form.

61936469
>>61936315
He’s literally right though

Refute him without sounding mad.

61936479
>>61936438
If your pour all of your wealth into gold you actually brick yourself. You lose 5% right off the bat, put yourself in major risk in the event of a flood or catastrophe, and now are at the mercy of local dealers and spot price when you need to buy.
Even the spergs who go all in on BTC can find vendors that accept it, rapidly convert it to fiat, store it effortlessly, use payment processors that quickswap to fiat, or even get loans for collateral.
>inb4 you sperg out because i mention fiat missing the point entirely

61936512
>>61936479
>the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold
>the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold
>the point isn't to pour all your net worth into gold
reading is hard

61936529
>>61936512
Almost like BTC can be used as a currency and gold can't

61936536
>>61936529
this has nothing to do with the argument. Just say you misread what I typed.

61936566
>>61936438
>My point is unlike bitcoin you can't become the greater fool buy buying physical gold.
Of course you can. Don't be silly.

61936574
>>61936536
Why would I use something that no one wants or trades as an emergency fund?
>yes good sir can I please have some good
>here's 1 oz of a shiny rock
>...what do you mean you don't want it!
>ITS FUCKING CONDUCTIVE!
Like nigga ur argument is so dumb that canned corn mogs gold by the same metric
There's better ways to be a doomsdaytard, but we're here for financial solutions assuming there isn't total global nuclear war

61936576
>>61936302
You do realize there is only a limited supply of gold right? You think refineries don’t exist for a reason.

item.content:encoded:

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-04 20:51 UTC

OP

What would it take to get there?

Early replies (first 3)

61936400
>>61936120
a few funny posts on x

61936470
>>61936120
Only thing that might do it is their humanoid robots. But China might as well be ahead of that too.

61936556
>>61936120
Buy a stock trading at 300 times earnings because it will be tading at 1000 times earnings.
Genius.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

item.title: Most people should just buy term insurance. — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Most people should just buy term insurance.

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-03-04 20:49 UTC

OP

Most people should just buy term insurance. But here’s the 10% case where the math actually works.

If you're just looking for solid, affordable protection for your family, honestly? Save your time. Grab a low-cost term policy, stick the rest of your money into a Roth IRA or a boring index fund, and go enjoy your weekend. That's the "gold standard" for a reason, it works for almost everyone.

But here’s the 10% case: Your 401k is maxed, your HSA is full, and your Backdoor Roth is done. You want capital working for you in a tax-advantaged way. You've reached an income level where "tax drag" in your brokerage account is starting to feel like a real anchor on your net worth, and you're looking for a more efficient way to grow "overflow" wealth

IUL policies have fees, typically 1-2% annually for insurance + administration (let's not pretend otherwise), but here's the thing: if you're *already* losing 20% to taxes every year in your brokerage, paying 1-2% in fees for tax-deferred growth starts to look pretty good. Especially over 20-30 years. (Results depend on individual tax circumstances and policy performance assumptions.)

This isn't some wealth hack. It's literally just math for people who've run out of other tax-advantaged options. For certain high-income individuals, a side-by-side projection using reasonable assumptions may show potential tax advantages over time. Outcomes are not guaranteed and depend on policy performance and tax law.

The insurance industry can be shady about fees. But companies like Amplify Life (full disclosure: they're who this is about) built calculators that actually show you both sides, what you'd pay in fees vs. what you'd save in taxes, using your real numbers. Their calculator itemizes major policy charges and compares projected outcomes under stated assumptions.

Worth checking if you're in that specific situation. If you haven't maxed your 401k and Roth yet, none of this applies to you.

Early replies (first 3)

61936378
>>61936267
Shut up retard

61936534
>>61936267
not reading all that shit, buy an ad next time

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 95 replies — 240.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 95 • Updated: 2026-03-04 20:33 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61922004
kek turd killer still being shilled here in 2026
lmfao nice AI pics btw

61922014
>>61922004

61922070
>>61922004
You have 2 more weeks wagie

61922078
I hope you don’t buy toad

61922734
No one is buying toad in a shib thread! Shib is going to 14x to ath and toad will go to zero. Shib already has an etf coming and toad has desperate curry flavored shills. LMAO!

61923250
>>61922734
When toad moons YOU'RE going to seethe, when toad moons YOU'RE going to rope!

61923260
>>61899833
I am in anon, people are too stupid to skip this one.
And some Doge in case the elom makes a comeback.

61924787
>>61922734
See
>>61922014

61926036
>>61899833
This thread smells like curry and shit.

Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.

61926122
>>61926036
>This thread smells like curry and shit.
So like most threads on /biz ?

>>61926036
>Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.
Sure buddy. The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!

61927655
>>61926122
>The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!
i'm genuinely considering dumping the rest of what i hold because of this post

61927803
>>61927655
Checked dump it

61927812
>>61899833
you will be lucky to get a 3x

61927816
>>61927812
Shib is ez 10x bear case 33x bull case

61927892
>>61927816
Never happening

61928058
>>61927892
>Shib will never go to a place it’s been before because it just won’t.
You sound tarded bro

61928094
>>61928058
It only went there because of insane hype and FOMO. It will never happen again unless Elon makes it the official currency of X or something

61928421
>>61927655
Please do fud chud. I like cheapies.
>>61927812
>>61928094
He didn't buy cheap before the etf and clarity act passed.
>NGMI!

61929970
> shib niggers in this thread ignoring the most obvious 1000-3000x token right in front of them

61931432
>>61929970
Its no use anon. These people like being poor. Sit back and hodl and wait for the fireworks.

61931717
Shib is positive returns for evm daily trade bots. Over 60% positive returns. So far they’re all trading at above 50% positive returns for bot trading. What ever happened to shiba sex? Still a general.

61931779
This thread makes me so happy, I thought all my Shibros had abandoned /biz/ forever...we're back in full force!

61932425
While retards in the chat slurping a shitcoin that’s already over 5 years olde, the smart money is dropping at least .2 eff on toad, just sitting back watching the drama unfold

61934414
50x

61934942
it begins...

61935122
Toads invade shib threads because its a zero volume zero interest and zero attention, its been a shit coin since early 2023. 1.9k holders that want to kys. Lol, lmao even.

61935440
>>61931779
SHIB blessing thread anon still here, i'm still here waiting for the time and it's going to happen

61936417
>>61935122
No u. Toad holders are going to make it.

61936442
my itch is on cheese, already bottomed only upwards from here

61936453
>>61936442

item.title: /pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins — 85 replies — 170.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
/pmg/ Pirates Metals Goblins

Open thread • Replies: 85 • Updated: 2026-03-04 20:27 UTC

OP

ARR!

Early replies (first 3)

61926222
yarrr

61926235
>>61926222
arr har har harr! get ye telescope and check this shipmate!

61926254
Arrgh matey, IQCHADJEETs Silva stock bussin nigga frfr on kirk nigga

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61929747
>>61929582
People who got rich have multi generational wealth spend money to cause things to fulfil prophesies because they are bored. It works until people catch on and can figure out when they buy and sell stuff. Purim blood moon at 3:33 AM PST? Massive sell off. Sell some of your stocks and before that day especially institutional investor heavy stocks. Then wait for cheapies in things you were eyeing. Just bought a share of an oil stock that dumped. Makes no sense that it would dump when it was showing the start of a long slow upward trajectory before a classic bull run. And that was before the Iran thing. Oil stock are hardly dumping because they shouldn't be. Aware people are buying today while they dump good stocks for no apparent reason because of dumb rituals. I will wait much longer for other things. I know this could go on for years.

61929770
>>61926208
Anyone else remember AYY lmao coin anon?
Had to sell all his coins because of a family emergency like 2 years ago

I still think about this alien coins he had some fucking cool shit
Poor fucker missed the pump

61929916
>>61929486
Anyone ever tried or had luck with refunding from TD precious metals? Shithawking the chart before I send off my email, knowing today it’ll pull some Talmud magic and moon when I ask for a refund/get refunded

61930008
>>61926208
4 March 2027, we meet and see who has the last laugh. You confident?

61931300
>>61930008
2027? absolutely. but you should be in a bunker by then.

61931346
>>61928874
never left, glad to see you too shipmate
>>61928544
this shipmate knows the course.
>>61928696
would buy that coin if i saw it in a shop, gave me a hearty har har!

61931497
kek baggies

61931541
This shit is too jewed, I'm going back to trading natural gas

61931566

61931581
>>61931541

61931664
>>61931497

^land lubbers

61931697
OP I have been enjoying your in-character Long John Silver posts.

61931715
>>61931697
it be the way of a pirate, t'be sure. make merry and enjoy life! especially when there be plunder to be had booty to be hoarding! nothing be warming the heart like the glow of gold from within me chest, ARR!

61931989
>>61931715
Yo-Ho
I've restocked the Flying Dutchman Captain

61932481
>>61931989
I regret buying moderately priced gin this week. I will pull out my free whiskey I looted from my relative's liquor cabinet. And yes I did loot. Boomer fag buys liquor faster than he can drink and forgets what he has. He wouldn't miss it. I am telling you Captain Silver, Boomer liquor cabinets have the best forgotten booze to take as booty.

61932523
>>61932481
Good man. Also damn you could be my nephew someday soon I better watch my stash"P

61933973

61935587

61935612

i expect a little dip, but just in case, I'm hoarding some booty now.
check this shipmate again >>61928544 i bought bitcoin in nov 2022, i had a feeling that was the dip. i have the same feeling now about silver. march is the last entry.

61935623
>>61935587
captain morgan is good, but it all does the same job!
ultimate pirate grog: mix one shot of everything you have in a tankard, add 2x as much water, dash of cinnamon and a teaspoon of sugar.

61935778
>>61935623

61935853

aye! that be all we had left after the weevil infestation, t'was 20 days from shore and the boots went down well after a few swigs of grog too!

(It was me):)

61935939

61935978

61936093

>>61935915

item.title: Does IQ make you more successful financially? — 46 replies — 38.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Does IQ make you more successful financially?

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-03-04 19:44 UTC

OP

Does IQ make you more successful financially?

Early replies (first 3)

61927833
>>61927814
No, but emotional intelligence does.

61927872
>>61927833
>emphaty
retard detected

61927878
>>61927814
>>61927833
>>61927872


now post her without make up and filters and 0.1sec clips

i'll wait

fucking yellow fever fags

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61928426
>>61927833
>Motivation
All is vanity as the preacher said. I can do things though but my heart will not be in any of them
>Social skills
Yes, i have them but i hate people and choose to avoid them like the plague
>Empathy
Real intelligence entails high levels of empathy. I get you're sad but i won't cry with you because your cat has died. I don't expect you to cry if my father dies. I won't. It's the circle of life, Simba.
>Self awareness
I can read a room perfectly enough to know when my antisemitic jokes haven't landed as i expected
>Self regulation
Buzzword i don't know what it means. I can regulate and adjust myself according to the situation.

61928448
>>61927814
I have ~130IQ and i'm a poorfag NEET college dropout at 24. I have very little self-control or motivation so it's hard to get and hold a job, and I am very socially awkward so it's hard to make connections (the only way to get any skilled job nowadays), so i ended up an outcast. Many people in that range seem to have similar issues.

However, if you have 110-120IQ you probably will be "normal" enough to not be a weird outcast and smart enough to get ahead of most normalfags, and if you're >145IQ you're a genius and will probably end up being world-class at something.

I'm not trying to sadpost or get sympathy, it's just what I've observed.

61928455
>>61928448
Yea being king of the midwits is the best, you just crash out if you have le intelligence and realize we live in hell

61928672
>>61927833
Every billionaire is a psycho that eats the babies he just raped and the goyim be like
>duuuude just be nice and money will come to you :)

61928885
>>61928448
I'm sorry man. Whenever I meet academic people they seem to be not that bright. Often they can only do that one thing they are specialized and that's it. They just had that motivation to study hard but they are not that smart. Still they make make good money. They just fit into the system and profit from it.

61928893
>>61927814
IQ is simply the ceiling for skill and knowledge. It alone doesn't guarantee anything.

61929003
>>61928885
That's because academic people *aren't* that bright. The median IQ of college professors is only 128, only slightly higher than medical doctors (124).
>>61928448
I have a 161 IQ and I'm also a college dropout.
>if you're >145IQ you're a genius and will probably end up being world-class at something
I wouldn't say I'm world-class at anything except shitposting on 4chan, but I think the extra IQ means it's easy to do well without really trying. The place I was working had spent years and millions of dollars trying to solve some knotty problems and had made no progress despite having a PhD and several mensa members on the team. I happened to overhear some discussion about it in the lunchroom and before I finished my ham sandwich I had figured out the solution, which led to me getting promoted to the technical lead on that team and making pretty good money, a decade later I'm in the top 1% in net worth in the US, all for a whopping 5 minutes of actual thinking.

61929120
IQ doesn't exist.

The only thing it tests, is if you are cognitively retarded or not. But then again, basically any type of test can determine that.

The only reason people still talk about IQ is because people's fragile ego's and political dogmas hinge upon it. Not because it has any scientific merit.

61929203
>>61929120
>reeee this thing I don't have doesn't ackshually exist
It's funny because you think you're being clever about it, but it's all just so transparent and sad.

61929223
>>61929203
It's funny how you confirmed exactly what he said with your little emotional outburst.
I have no idea what my IQ is myself, never tested it. All the smart guys I know never tested their IQ either, if you care about it, that's already a sign you're an insecure midwit

61929256
>>61927814
how the fuck would i know

61929257
>>61929120
t. 94 IQ faggot who thought he was the next Einstein before taking the test

61929269
>>61929223
Actual smart guys were taken by their parents to a psychologist for IQ testing in grade school though, it's a necessary step for skipping grades and early graduation/college.

61929405
>>61929257
>>61929203
This is always the boring predictable response from losers and failures with no achievements in life, and no real talents. Just to bait me into revealing that I happened to score very highly on the IQ test.

Lack of introspection is a sign of low intelligence though. So naturally when you got *your* bullshit score, you didn't question it for a second, and proudly displayed it on your reddit profiles.

61929628
>>61929405
>So naturally when you got *your* bullshit score, you didn't question it for a second
this is evidence you never did an IQ test in your life

61929644
>>61929269
Why are you trying to proof he had no high IQ? You are proofing him again by doing it. "people's fragile ego's and political dogmas hinge upon it." :)

61929692
>>61927814
does pooping make women smell better?

61929814
Get a load of this young lady.
(temperance)

61930178
>>61927872
Its a jeet.
>hello saars pleas have the emphaty

61930196
>>61927878
she is not fat.
i simple cannot get hard with fat women.
even an average asian woman is 10x hotter than your average burger woman by virtue of not being disgustingly obese.

61930320
>>61928672
I'm opportunist and being nice pays off most of the time. They are ways to make money that require being asshole but being an asshole alone doesn't make any money. Some people always want to play against the rules but that's sailing against the wind and makes things unnecessary difficult. Most men are not willing to please a man to get rich. It doesn't need to be homoerotic. Just understanding what HE wants and giving it to him in exchange to the thing you want from him. It can be anything. Something simple as being nice or doing him a favor. Since I have a boyfriend I have learned a lot about men. They are just as emotional as women but try to hide it all the time. If you can read them anyway you know weather they like or dislike something you do. You can read if they are emotionally attached to you, to know if you can ask them for a favor.

Bullying or trolling people on 4chan doesn't make any money but people do it anyway because they want to feel good. They don't think about weather each of there actions in life will cost or gain them money long term. There only measurement is weather it feels good in the moment.

61930333
>>61927833
sounds gay

61930366
>>61927881
There is a difference between empathy and compassion. If you don't have empathy you are kind of retarded.

61930381
>>61930366
^^^

61930579
>>61927833
All five of these are so critical that lacking one can ruin your entire life. It's the term "emotional intelligence" that's really gay and ruins the whole thing. Swapping the word emotional for something like behavioral or social would be more well received.

61930771
>>61930579
That's a male problem and not the words fault. It's job is to be true, not to be seen as straight and be popular among men.

61931401
>>61930320
In my experience the most important skill to succeed is to be the kind of narcissist who can't shut the fuck up about himself. Somehow those people are always ahead. They tend to be great manipulators too
>>61930320
>It's job is to be true
Well it fails at that then because "social skills" and "self awareness" are not emotions.

61933605
>>61928032
what game is this from?>

61933612
>>61930366
you need a lot of empathy to find pleasure in the suffering of others

61935002
>>61931401
Then call it how you like.

item.title: Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. — 37 replies — 23.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted.

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-03-04 19:20 UTC

OP

Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.

Instead Chainlink keeps the scam going for years and years, with new "partnerships" and "news" and "integrations", all while the token does nothing. They give just enough breadcrumbs to keep the baggies holding on desperately for a pump, and they probably keep buying even more LINK tokens as well ensuring they remain poor forever as they wait for a "mega moon" that never comes.

In that way it's actually a more brutal and evil scam, but still funny. It's crazy because all they had to do was buy Bitcoin... or gold, or the S&P 500, or literally anything else.

Early replies (first 3)

61931782
fuck all stinkies :}
hate em all hate em all
think they SUUUUCK xD

61931907
>>61931684
>At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.
Wait a minute. You're telling me I've DCA'd into a scam all these years?

61931931
thanks for keeping this a Chainlink board

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61931997
>>61931976
don't forget GME :} the list of shit that is superior to even link is endless

61932038
>>61931958
Just keep doing what your doing. Sit in your chair in the corner and keep informing me of my financial performance on an hourly basis so that I dont need to open up the app. Thanks.

61932060
This site is shit now. I'm on here less and less. What a rubbish thread. Twitter completely ate /biz's lunch.

61932062
>>61931684
what's the deal with the LINK obsession? there are hundreds of bad cryptos to invest in, like every single one of them. why the singling out? reads like a psyop.

61932076
>>61932038
ok

61932086
>>61932062
Because linkies were smug. They fudded their own token endlessly to keep normies away from making it. We had to spend years listening to their grandiose scenarios, their $81k prediction and their lack of self awareness. Now linkies will spend years listening how bad they failed. Their hubris was their fall. Adem won.

61932119
>>61932062
>reads like a psyop.
/biz is a psyop board ran by banking cartel flunkies, anything that gets fudded here I assume is a threat to the bank niggers and I dive in out of spite

61932122
>>61932086
this
we fuddies are the warriors of justice
we will see to it that the linkie hubris is punished for all eternity
might i remind you all that one of link's first memes was "are nolinkers even human?"

61932285
>>61932086
ill agree with this in about 10 more years if link never hits 100

for the next 10 years ill buy link tho. should pump to 11 some day ,

61932295
yikes

61932298
chainlink will be sub $5 this year. let that sink in.

61932327
>>61932298
If it does I will put usd 5 million in, just to spite you, you insufferable fuck. Ffs. Give it a rest.

61932513
>>61932327
>i-i-i'm a bajillionaire....
cope, stinky

61932516
>>61932513
Haha, you don't understand. It doesn't matter what i do or do not have. Anons do.

61932522
If we could be guaranteed that link would moon to $500 tomorrow but 10% of us would be injected with AIDS. Would you guys vote for that happening?

61932558
Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe. It’s quite literally in their best interest to keep this shit low.

61932671
It has been a brutal hold and I'm better off focusing on a high income career than waiting for this shit. I could have semi retired in 2021 but didn't sell.

61932731
Crazy how these threads are always 95 percent the same brown fuddie cockroach hopping ids and replying to himself to give the illusion of consensus.
Like there's no point whatsoever. Everyone's on x where you're salty and blocked and nothing posted here changes or does anything lmao. A million hours wasted on nothing

Herbs

61932783
>>61932731
Crazy how you keep seasoning dozens and even hundreds of threads after all these years and yet you keep coming back to them like a pig at the trough.
One might even be liberal enough to say that you keep coming back to them as if you were a paypig at the trough.

61932904
>>61932558
Link will be $999 in 2126 and fudies WILL ROPE

>just hold for a century bruv

61932907
>>61932731
Ok but price? Chart?

61933029
its funny seeing the same fudders unleashing their pent up vitriol day in day out fudding their own shitcoin after all these years, brain damaged cucks lmao. You retards were smug yourselves, wasted 2 bull markets in a row being all uppity and keeping le normies out xddd, should have bought some other shitcoins and not sat on your asses hahaha maybe then you wouldnt waste your life f5'ing this dead board to cry about link (the same token that makes up 90+% of your portfolio because you're a dumb poorfaggot who has 0 clue how to make money)

61933088
>>61932522
yes

61933115
>>61933029
Nice essay but adem won

61934197
>>61933088
checked, but if you say yes then you are auto included in that 10%

61934242
money talks

61934584
>>61932086
correct. the boyscouts tried to dish it out, but they sure as hell can't take it

all talk, no walk

their hubris was their downfall
>>61932295

look at how low energy you are bro. you have no material, you have no gains, you have no confidence

take that L like a man

61934590
>>61932558
>Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe.


i would pay to see one of you awkward losers try to hire a hitman in real life. if by some miracle you even managed to contact one of these groups, i imagine they'd look you over, make sure no one was around, and just take your money and then disappear

at which point you'd have no other option other than to to back to larping as a badass online

61935620
take the L, stinkbots

61936147
>>61934590
>well they'll never find my suicidal porn blog entries or notice my simping after niggerdick on x
>well they'll never find out that I'm a third worlder who dropped out of business school to join a mlm scam company that got busted
>well they'll never find out what I look like
>well they'll never message people I know
>well they'll just forget I sold my stack for wormhole and linksol and that I got irrevocably fucked as a result

You thought all of those things at one stage, now everyone including you knows how incredibly incredibly retarded you are... but dw I'm sure that
>well nothing will ACTUALLY happen when some mentally ill new millionaires target me for sport

Will totally hold and you'll be perfectly fine lil fella

item.title: I sold my crypto for gold and silver right before gold and silver dumped and crypto mooned You cannot make this shit up… — 21 replies — 19.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
I sold my crypto for gold and silver right before gold and silver dumped and crypto mooned You cannot make this shit up…

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-03-04 19:52 UTC

OP

I sold my crypto for gold and silver right before gold and silver dumped and crypto mooned
You cannot make this shit up man, I am so fucking cooked holy shit FUCK me

I would be up 7k but I am down 2k are u FUCKING serious

Early replies (first 3)

61935834
>>61935808
It is time to unleash the chang
Pumppp my bagsss

61935838
I straight up psyched myself out of my position
I CANNOT believe I let the Jews win
I LET THE FUCKING JEWS PSYCH ME OUT
I CANNOT BELIEVE I LET THE FUCKING SHEKELSTIENS DO THIS TO ME

61935854
EPSTEIN FUCKING GOT ONE OVER ME
FUCKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKKK

HANG THE FUCKING JEW BANKERS ALL OF THEM

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61935858

61935861
>>61935808
you should have known war with Iran is crypto bullish

61935866
>>61935858
>>61935861
>>61935834
I WAS IN FUCKING POSITION
A DAY BEFORE IT PUMPED A FUCKING DAY

>i should sell for something safer like gold and silver

FUCK JEWS FUCK THEM ALL SKIN THEM THE FUCK ALIVE FUCK THE FED

61935878
>>61935808
Even so you'll make it

61935879
>>61935808

61935881
$65,000 IN CRYPTO
>nah I should sell
A DAY FUCKING BEFORE A DAY

FUCK YOU ROTHSCHILD FUCKER S

61935896
>>61935879
MY EMOTIONS I THOUGHT I WASNT CONTROLLED BY MY EMOTION S I THOUGHT I WAS LOGICAL
FUCK

>>61935878
I HAVE TO WAIT UNTIL NEXT FUCKIN CYCLE NOW

61935907

61935916
>>61935866

61935928
>>61935896

nobody does

outsiders were always right when they said it's a casino and to not mess with it

61935940
>>61935808

61935942
>>61935808

crypto is not "mooning". we have fallen so much over the past few months. you still have time to buy back in

61935950
>>61935928
>>61935916
EVEN MY ID MAKES FUN OF ME
IM A FUCKING GOYIM

I HAVE TO DEAL IN THE REAL WORLD
AHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH

61935952
>>61935808
you sold an adam eve for a return to normal? I wish you the best!

61935961
>>61935950
Gold and silver are real. Crypto is fake and gay.

61936205
Nobody but bagholders who already held for 5+ years made money on gold and silver. Stop chasing hype.

61936277
>>61935896
Try removing emotion from the equation and base it purely off of logic and general sentiment instead.

The same logic is why doctors don't have friends and relatives as patients.

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-03-04 18:08 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61933655

EVChuds won!

61933658
>>61933646

61933661

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61933787
>>61933712
>CFD Petrolio WTI
europoor spotted

61933802
>>61933723
Here it's 1.26. Saturday it was 1.16 for Diesel. Cunts just waited for a reason to bump prices

61933843
>>61933787
spot americh

61933854
>>61933723
amerimutts love to bitch and moan about everything
they pay less for fuel, cars and houses while earning more than me
I hate them so god damn much it's unreal

61933923
>>61933802
Wow wtf where? Bulgaria?

61933934
>>61933923
Yeah. It was fairly quiet at the pumps yesterday, but i live in small town, so things in big cities might be different. Romania i think has the lowest fuel prices in the area (outside of Turkey, but Turkey is turbofucked by inflation). I was surprised how expensive fuel is in Serbia and Hungary though.

61933947
>>61933934
I hope americans also suffer at least, this is painful

61933970
>>61933712
>that time crude went negative
fun memories

61933976
>>61933658
https://youtu.be/nxU2UjAjN24?si=Ikj3g6n-ZJtlHujt

61934153
>>61933646
its still cheap, oil was 150 like 16 years ago, then add all the inflation created, it should be around 200 looking at all the other prices, gold was 800 when oil was 150, thats 5 barrels for one oz, today you can buy 70 barrels for one oz

61934229
>>61934153
That was a generational blowofftop. Also what has Gold to do with that?

61934337
Is the US Dollar in a bear trap right now after gaining value on the 3rd?

61934629
>>61933646
uh...
it's not closed...

61934639
>>61934629
Only the bravest goys are crossing it

61934640
if they're just going to keep doing this every 3 or so years why not fucking nuke them? seriously, send them back even further to the stone age than they already are? fucking goat fucking retards

iran? no i was talking about america

61934642
Good. Car centricity was a mistake. People should be thrown in jail over it.

61934643
>>61934629
They let Russia/China ships through. But look at all those retards sitting there waiting

61934644
>>61934639
everyone is fucking crossing

61934652
>>61934643
a ton of tankers from everywhere are passing
this is another nothingburger

61934659
oh look a Greek tanker has refilled in UAE and is going home

61934861
>>61933661
fucking lmao

61935291
>>61934644
>>61934652
>>61934659

61935303
>>61933646
why do we listen to goldman's sack anyway

61935322
>>61933646
Its literally June all over again oil is going to 180 a barrel

61935374
nothing will happen. Even the gulf states want to fuck Iran up so they can keep the gravy train rolling.

61935395
how do they keep the strait closed with no airforce or navy? you think they can keep it closed with c4 drones?

61935508
>>61935395
Well, yeah, same way a country with no navy raped one with a navy and doesn't have its ship sailing out of (desperately) enclosed ports anymore

61935619
>>61935291
Welcome to /biz/, where jews try to make you money.

61935637
>>61935395
>no airforce or navy
They have rockets and drones. They launched 700 rockets in these few days, and 1700 drones, apparently. And they can supposedly produce 300 drones a day. Welcome to the new world where a ship can absolutely be raped to death by a drone. Those aren't military ships, they're not built to survive explosions. And most are carrying oil

61935706
>>61934652
They're sitting at the pipeline. They're not crossing the strait.

item.title: Guys.. — 18 replies — 12.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Guys..

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-04 19:32 UTC

OP

NO ONE WILL hire me
How do I actually make money without getting a physical job? I know it is possible because other people are doing it:

Early replies (first 3)

61934866
>>61934860
have you tried mcdonalds?

61934874
>>61934866
I did. I even got to the interview stage. Then they told me they werent actually hiring. I tried pizza hut too btw.

61934892
>>61934874
Why don't you want to become a Pizza Hut Talent™? I'm sure if you work hard and join the top 0.01% of all legacy humans, they will one day offer a pay-to-work internship through some government scheme.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61934898
>>61934860
I am in the same boat bro. I quit at the post office and now I am just drifting. Nobody will hire me. Best buy? No. Home depot? No. chick filet? No. Mobile phone repair? No.

61934922
>>61934898
fuck

61934926
If you do end up needing something in a pinch see if ULINE has anything than can tide you over

61934928
>>61934926
None in my area, thanks for the offer though
I suppose I should clarify what also hurts my chances of getting a job is I dont have a car. And i like in a small town. So that really fucking sucks

61934934
>>61934860
Work as a caregiver in home health. No cert needed. You'll wipe old people ass and are basically paid to be a boomers friend for a few days a week.

61934937
>>61934934
I will not do that.

61934941
>>61934937

You're going to fondle the balls that sold you out.

61934987
>>61934928

61935054
>>61934860
Violence against the state is ALWAYS hiring.

61935820
>>61934922
What do we do bros? I am very close to asking my mom for a loan.

61936087
>>61934860
Guess it's time to light some rich neighborhoods on fire then isn't it?

61936108
>>61935054
Against? Don’t you mean for?

61936118
>>61934898
bruh, you quit the post office. are you fucking retarded?
I'd kill for an easy cruise control kinda job

61936170
>>61934860
It is doable but, you will need to purchase assets as if you do not have these constraints and interact with them as if you have all the time in the world to minimize micromanaging yourself into underperformance, a method if you are a complete beginner is 1) find a asset you are interested in method of finding it does not matter , 2) analyze previous 10ks ( just get ai to help you if you are new but this is the part that will need constant education) and the DEF 14A (proxy statements) to get a rundown of what it is that the company does, you want to hold an asset that actually know roughly what it does 3) read reports and analysis from investment banks, financial news sites, investment forums (such as value investor club) and other forums look for reasons that the asset may be good and be aware of positive or negative biases, 4) combine 2 and 3 through analysis of their financial position as well as their actual business operation with what Conesus is of the asset and see if the price of the asset is and if it reflects this correctly. then buy accordingly

61936186
>physical job
I assume you mean physical labor, like construction or warehousing.
I was in this position a few months ago. Starbucks had a real human being (the manager of the local store) call me back within a few days to schedule an interview. Before this, I was getting teased by applying to fake datamining job postings and cucked by AI filters.
I'm making $16/hr and it keeps me afloat from month to month. Better than $0/hr and starving I guess.

item.title: I'm rich, and I really feel very bad for poor people, and THERE ARE TOO MUCH poor people, I don't deserve my wealth if t… — 11 replies — 12.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
I'm rich, and I really feel very bad for poor people, and THERE ARE TOO MUCH poor people, I don't deserve my wealth if t…

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-04 20:03 UTC

OP

I'm rich, and I really feel very bad for poor people, and THERE ARE TOO MUCH poor people, I don't deserve my wealth if they don't get a lot from me, I want to cure diseases and give the rest to a lot of people!
Why is the world so unjust?

Early replies (first 3)

61932888
Are you having a manic episode?

61932897
>>61932882
Imagine feeling bad for poorfags locked in generational spiritual and mental poverty despite the last 30 years being the absolute GREATEST and EASIEST time to create generational wealth from nothing. If you're poor in 2026, you are genuinely braindamaged and beyond saving. It means you and your bloodline are MEANT to be poor. You literally had 30 years. Poorfags cope and seethe

61932916
>>61932882
Life is not so bad, even poorfaggots have a good time every now and then. Most are deformed and ignorant subhumans and yet they have sex since their teens, laugh at stupid shit, get drunk with friends, etc. They are literal cattle. Meanwhile the patrician NEET rich faggot feels like you, you feel sorry for them, try to make their lives better somehow, maybe you have a existential dread and believe in stupid esoteric shit while suffering impostor syndrome and extreme loneliness . Poor faggots are way happy than any of us frogposter incels who lost the ability to bond with others and love

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61932962
>>61932916
What about kids living in hell in Africa?

61932967
>>61932962
move to africa to help them, anon

61932987
>>61932962
They don't live long. We all die anyways. What's the alternative? Dying at 80 in a hospital surrounded by your loved ones like a faggot? We all die. That 3 years old kid dying of malnutrition about to be canibalized is the lucky one because all he knew was pain and is about to end for good forever. If there is a God, he is returning to him, and if there is nothing he goes back to eternal oblivion. Some may say this hypthetical African kid had an authentic life instead of being a faggot living with too much comfort living a stupid artificial life posting cartoon frogs

61933000
>>61932987
I mean, maybe this african niglet sucked on his mother saggy titties while his mother hugged him and lullabied him to sleep. That one day of bliss was enough for this hypothetical faggot

61933085
>>61932882
I look down on them with contempt.

Unless you literally had/have cancer, or some other life-altering disease or tragic event that simply was a product of bad luck, I have no mercy for the poor.

61935355
>>61933085
If you lost everything, they will fuck you up

61935371
>>61932882
If you care then what you can do is help people. Help people that are actually willing to put in the work and make sure it is mutually beneficial like maybe you start a farm and you have a house that a good white family can stay in and they do all the farm work for you

61936322
If you have the money to do good, then do it.
Don't get scammed by charities and people who claim to use your money to benefit others.
If you give, do it after a ton of research.

Maybe you just enjoy being a good person and enjoy your blessing.

Don't make the world worse by donating to a horribly evil charity with a shiny happy facade.

Good luck saving the world!
